nodes.context: Japanese American gang founded in Manzanar concentration camp during WWII, involved in petty crime and later more serious offenses.
Sub-group of Tokyo Boyz consisting of Japanese-Americans from Japan.
Sub-group of Tokyo Boyz consisting of first generation Japanese-Americans.
Sub-group of Tokyo Boyz consisting of second generation Japanese-Americans.

edges.evidence_quote: They were split into three groups/ranks, The Kibei Boys (Japanese-Americans from Japan), Issei Boys (1st generation Japanese-Americans), and the Nisei Boys (2nd generation Japanese-Americans).
edges.context: Kibei Boys is a sub-group of Tokyo Boyz.

edges.evidence_quote: They were split into three groups/ranks, The Kibei Boys (Japanese-Americans from Japan), Issei Boys (1st generation Japanese-Americans), and the Nisei Boys (2nd generation Japanese-Americans).
edges.context: Issei Boys is a sub-group of Tokyo Boyz.

edges.evidence_quote: They were split into three groups/ranks, The Kibei Boys (Japanese-Americans from Japan), Issei Boys (1st generation Japanese-Americans), and the Nisei Boys (2nd generation Japanese-Americans).

Jackson-Side Wah Ching is listed as an ally of Tokyo Boyz in the infobox.
